title: BoatFly
description: a server and client side mode to fly on a boat  /boat speed (Max 50)
body:
⚙ How It Works

When flight mode is enabled:

Gravity is disabled

Movement speed is calculated in real blocks per second

Ice forms only under the boat (no trail spam)

Ice stays if the boat is stationary

🌊 Designed For

Sky highways

Ice speed builds

Survival utility

Multiplayer servers

Creative mobility

🧩 Compatibility

Minecraft 1.20.1

Forge 47.4.x

Works in singleplayer and dedicated servers
